name: favicon
title: Favicon
description: The Enjab favicon, code-generated. REQUIRED in every Enjab project, no exceptions. A gradient square with a glyph (default the letter 'E'); edit the GLYPH constant to use a different letter or any Lucide icon, same look. PNG output, so it works in Safari (no .ico needed). Drops app/icon.tsx + app/apple-icon.tsx into the Next.js app dir.
